prompt: my brother yoad just graduated CS and is looking for his first dev job. can you check if fireblocks has any open positions? he's based in israel

assertions.text: The output fetches data from the Fireblocks Greenhouse API endpoint (boards-api.greenhouse.io/v1/boards/fireblocks/jobs)
Results include specific job titles (not just 'jobs available')
Results include apply URLs or links for individual positions
Results mention location information for jobs
Output is formatted as a readable list or table (not raw JSON)
